title: Death Announcer
description: This mod ridicules and humiliates player deaths to everyone in a fun way!
body:
# Death Announcer

When a player dies, it announces the death on everyone's screen in a comedic way! This is especially used in hardcore worlds to grab the attention of a person's death. As you can see from the GIF below, the player dies and a creeper animation shows up!

![A demonstration of an announced death after a player dies!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/agC12gSb/images/1bc82e51b5653685f9ec2e31fd5e9823f0778ac2.gif)

For the animation and sound to sync properly, please ensure your server is not lagging (maintaining a stable [20 TPS / 50 MSPT](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tick))
